name: Smede Hwy Industrial Tract (Hwy 90 Corridor, Broussard)
notes:
Listed by Bart Broussard, The Gleason Group. 46.49 acres of industrial/multi-family vacant land on Smede Hwy off US Hwy 90 in Broussard. 575 ft of highway frontage. Traffic light at industrial park entrance provides truck access in both directions (Lafayette / New Iberia). Area is growing — Safesource Direct PPE facility and oilfield businesses expanding nearby. SLEMCO electric service (Neuville substation ~1.5 mi in Youngsville). Multiple gas transmission pipelines traverse the Hwy 90 corridor through St. Martin Parish (Acadian Gas, Gulf South, Tennessee Gas). Parish has among the lowest taxes in Louisiana. Also listed on St. Martin Parish Economic Development site and RE/MAX.
Flood: Zone X — Minimal flood risk | Pipeline est: 2.0 mi | Acres: 46.49 | https://www.homes.com/property/1050-smede-hwy-broussard-la/

name: Hwy 90 Energy Corridor Tract (Gray, Terrebonne Parish)
notes:
108.27 acres of raw land at NE corner of US Hwy 90 (Future I-49) and LA Hwy 24. Listed at $3,248,100 ($30,000/acre). Address: 126 Executive Dr, Gray, LA 70359. Listed by Shawn Heck, Heck Realty / Keller Williams Realty Bayou Partners (985) 262-4400. Marketed as 'Louisiana's Energy Corridor.' NO ZONING OR RESTRICTIONS. Almost entirely in FEMA Flood Zone X (minimal flood risk — ideal). Lying 7 mi S of Thibodaux, 4 mi N of Houma. Transcontinental (Transco/Williams Companies) and Gulf South (Boardwalk Partners) gas transmission pipelines both traverse the Hwy 90 corridor through Terrebonne Parish. FERC recently approved $91.8M Transco expansion in this area. Related 160-acre parent parcel also available from same agent. Multiple other parcels (24.2 ac, 17.37 ac) along same interchange also listed. Terrebonne Parish is a major oil & gas services hub.
Flood: Outside mapped area — assume minimal risk | Pipeline est: 0.5 mi | Acres: 108.27 | https://www.homes.com/property/126-executive-dr-gray-la-70359/

name: Hwy 3235 Unrestricted Commercial/Industrial Tract (Cut Off, Lafourche Parish)
notes:
25.1 acres on Hwy 3235, Cut Off, LA 70345. Land.com Property ID 4604538. Listed by Jim Rolfe. Unrestricted — suitable for commercial, industrial, agricultural, or residential. Level and cleared land on high-traffic 4-lane highway. Highway frontage ~3.94 acres (409x449x378x427 ft). Rear 21.13 acres addressed as 17226-A Hwy 3235. Currently improved as commercial shooting range (935-yard rifle range, 9 benches, 5-man sporting clay range, storage sheds/oilfield containers, enclosed office/meeting room, concrete drive and parking lot). Also formerly listed on LoopNet at 14968 Highway 3235 (Cut Off Range Complex). Lafourche Parish is served by South Coast Gas (500+ miles of distribution). Columbia Gulf Transmission, Southern Natural Gas, and Transco pipelines all traverse Lafourche Parish. Connected to Henry Hub feeds. Inside levee protection system. Price estimated at parish avg ~$25,769/acre (call agent for exact price). Adjacent 38.63-acre and 13.7-acre unrestricted parcels also available on Hwy 3235 for potential assemblage.
Flood: No GPS — flood zone not checked | Pipeline est: 1.5 mi | Acres: 25.1 | https://www.land.com/property/25.1-acres-in-Lafourche-Parish-Louisiana/4604538/

name: Highway 1011 Rural Tract (Napoleonville, Assumption Parish)
notes:
Listed at $450,000 for 72 acres ($6,250/acre — well below parish avg of $40K/acre). MLS# 2024022594. Listed by Nicholas Melvin, Canal & Main Realty. Located at TBD LA 1011, Napoleonville, LA 70390. Partially wooded with open spaces, split by Supreme Road. Two ponds (11 acres and 2 acres). Serene rural setting. Southern Natural Gas and Columbia Gulf Transmission pipelines traverse Assumption Parish along Bayou Lafourche corridor. South Coast Gas distributes natural gas in Assumption Parish. Property is in a sugar cane / livestock farming area. Excellent price for large acreage. Parish is part of Harvest Bend CCS Hub (EnLink Midstream, Storegga, Talos Energy — 2026 target). Also listed on Homes.com, LandWatch, ByOwner.com.
Flood: No GPS — flood zone not checked | Pipeline est: 2.0 mi | Acres: 72 | https://www.land.com/property/72-acres-in-assumption-parish-louisiana/22611802/
